data.ask_weather: Get detailed current weather information for San Francisco, California including temperature, humidity, wind speed, forecast, and any weather alerts.

data:
Here's a comprehensive weather report for **San Francisco, CA** 🌉:

---

## 🌤️ Current Weather — San Francisco
| Detail | Value |
|---|---|
| 🌡️ **Temperature** | 21.3°C (70.3°F) |
| 💧 **Humidity** | 48% |
| 💨 **Wind Speed** | 28.8 km/h (17.9 mph) |
| ☁️ **Conditions** | Clear Sky |

> ✅ **Weather Alerts:** No active weather alerts at this time.

---

## 📅 7-Day Forecast
| Date | High | Low | Conditions |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Tue, Jun 3** | 22.9°C / 73.2°F | 10.9°C / 51.6°F | 🌫️ Fog |
| **Wed, Jun 4** | 22.6°C / 72.7°F | 10.4°C / 50.7°F | ☀️ Clear Sky |
| **Thu, Jun 5** | 22.0°C / 71.6°F | 10.9°C / 51.6°F | 🌤️ Mainly Clear |
| **Fri, Jun 6** | 17.0°C / 62.6°F | 12.2°C / 54.0°F | ☁️ Overcast |
| **Sat, Jun 7** | 19.3°C / 66.7°F | 10.9°C / 51.6°F | ☁️ Overcast |
| **Sun, Jun 8** | 18.0°C / 64.4°F | 11.8°C / 53.2°F | ☁️ Overcast |
| **Mon, Jun 9** | 18.5°C / 65.3°F | 12.6°C / 54.7°F | ☁️ Overcast |

---

## 🔍 Summary & Insights
- **Right now**, San Francisco is enjoying a pleasant **clear sky** with comfortable temperatures and moderate humidity.
- **Winds are brisk** at nearly 29 km/h — typical for SF's famous bay breezes.
- **Early this week** looks great with clear to partly clear skies and warm highs near 23°C (~73°F).
- **Mid-to-late week** a cool-down is expected, with overcast conditions dominating Friday through Monday and highs dipping to the high 60s°F.
- **Fog** is expected Tuesday morning — classic Karl the Fog making an appearance! 🌫️
- **No weather alerts** or hazardous conditions are forecasted.

| Jun 03 | $713,692 | 🟢 +$6,482 |

---

## 🔍 Trend Analysis & Insights

- **📉 Short-term Pullback, then Recovery:** BRK-A hit a **10-day high of $728,641 on May 22**, then underwent a gradual 7-day pullback, bottoming out at **$705,161 on June 1** — a drop of ~$23,480 (~3.2%).
- **💪 Strong Bounce Back:** The stock has since rebounded strongly over the last two sessions, gaining ~**$8,531 (+1.2%)** from its recent low — a healthy sign of buying interest at support levels.
- **Today's Momentum:** Today's **+$6,482 gain (+0.92%)** signals positive momentum, suggesting continued recovery toward its recent highs.
- **Why No Stock Split?** Warren Buffett has **intentionally never split BRK-A shares** since 1965, believing the ultra-high price attracts long-term, serious investors rather than short-term speculators.
- **BRK-B Alternative:** Berkshire also offers **BRK-B (Class B shares)**, which trade at roughly **1/1,500th the price** of BRK-A, making it accessible to everyday investors.

---

## 🧠 About Berkshire Hathaway
- **CEO:** Warren Buffett (Chairman & CEO since 1965)
- **Headquarters:** Omaha, Nebraska, USA
- **Industry:** Diversified Holding Company (Insurance, Energy, Railways, Consumer Goods & more)
- **Notable Holdings:** Apple (AAPL), Bank of America, Coca-Cola, American Express, and hundreds more.

> ⚠️ **Disclaimer:** This data is for informational purposes only and does not constitute financial advice. Always consult a licensed financial advisor before making investment decisions.
